hero.title: SOLORAH
hero.subtitle: Listen to what the cards have to tell you

oracleAmour.name: Love Oracle
oracleAmour.description: An oracle dedicated to matters of the heart. 44 cards to illuminate your love life, relationships, and deepest emotions.

tarotMarseille.name: Tarot de Marseille Remastered
tarotMarseille.description: The ancestral tarot reimagined with a contemporary aesthetic. 78 arcana to explore all areas of your life.

oracleShiva.name: Shiva Oracle
oracleShiva.description: An oracle inspired by Shiva's wisdom. 20 cards to illuminate your decisions and find your path.

dailyReading.name: Daily Reading
dailyReading.description: A Tarot de Marseille card drawn each day to guide your journey. Come back every morning for your daily message.

yesNo.name: Yes / No Reading
yesNo.description: Ask your question and draw a card. The Tarot de Marseille gives you a clear tendency: yes or no.

threeCards.name: Three Card Reading
threeCards.description: Past, Present, Future — three Love Oracle cards to illuminate your emotional path.

crossSpread.name: Cross Spread
crossSpread.description: Five Tarot de Marseille cards laid out in a cross for a complete analysis of your situation.

loveReading.name: Love Reading
loveReading.description: A special love reading with the Love Oracle. Discover the message the heart holds for you.

step1.title: Choose your deck
step1.description: Love Oracle, Tarot de Marseille or Shiva Oracle — each deck has its unique energy.

step2.title: Draw your cards
step2.description: Focus on your question, then let your intuition guide your choice.

step3.title: Receive your message
step3.description: Discover the interpretation of your cards and the message they carry for you.

consultation.description: Want a personalized, in-depth interpretation? Ask your question to our oracle.

footer.disclaimer: Readings are offered for entertainment and personal development purposes only. They are purely cultural, recreational and playful in nature. Divination and card readings are not an exact science. Interpretations are automatically generated for informational purposes only and should never be used as a substitute for medical, psychological, legal or financial advice. This service is intended for adults (18+) only.
footer.cookies: This site only uses technical cookies necessary for its operation (preferences, authentication). No advertising or tracking cookies.
